text: West Germany: Despite the demonstration of Christian Democratic Union (CDU) solidarity in electing Heinrich Luebke president on 1 July, internal CDU tensions resulting from the Adenauer-Erhard dispute remain. Adenauer probably will continue his efforts to eliminate Economics Minister Erhard as a possible successor. These efforts most likely will take the form of a behind-the-scenes campaign. The chancellor's first move may be to transfer certain aspects of foreign economic policy to the Foreign and Finance ministries
